allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "mkdir css js\\games js\\utils pages\\games assets\\images assets\\icons 2>&1 && echo Done")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\zhrui\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\cultural-games" && for f in pages/games/fanorona.html pages/games/mahjong.html pages/games/o-an-quan.html pages/games/oware.html pages/games/pallanguzhi.html pages/games/patolli.html pages/games/puluc.html pages/games/tien-len.html; do
